title: South Africa and England ready for Netball battle in Jozi
description: NETBALL NEWS - The sun has set on final...
bodyText: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Tickets are available on shop.netball-sa.org.za or there will be cashless ticket sales at the door."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"NETBALL NEWS - The sun has set on final preparations by the Spar Proteas and Vitality Roses ahead of their series, The Spar Challenge as it kicks off today at Ellis Park Arena in the City of Johannesburg this week.","html":"NETBALL NEWS - The sun has set on final preparations by the Spar Proteas and Vitality Roses ahead of their series, The Spar Challenge as it kicks off today at Ellis Park Arena in the City of Johannesburg this week."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pictured at Johannesburg’s iconic Zoo Lake with the Spar Challenge trophy is from left South African Spar Proteas captain, KC Chawane and England’s Vitality Roses captain Fran Williams.","html":"Pictured at Johannesburg’s iconic Zoo Lake with the Spar Challenge trophy is from left South African Spar Proteas captain, KC Chawane and England’s Vitality Roses captain Fran Williams."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The three international test match series will be played on Thursday 29 January (18:00), Saturday 31 January (17:00) and Sunday 1 February (16:00)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Two hours before each of the women’s test matches the South African men will be playing against the Australian Kelpies in a friendly Pre-Match Challenge.","html":"Two hours before each of the women’s test matches the South African men will be playing against the Australian Kelpies in a friendly Pre-Match Challenge."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tickets are available on shop.netball-sa.org.za or there will be cashless ticket sales at the door.","html":"Tickets are available on shop.netball-sa.org.za or there will be cashless ticket sales at the door."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All matches will be shown live on SuperSport.","html":"All matches will be shown live on SuperSport."}]
bodyHtml: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Tickets are available on shop.netball-sa.org.za or there will be cashless ticket sales at the door."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"NETBALL NEWS - The sun has set on final preparations by the Spar Proteas and Vitality Roses ahead of their series, The Spar Challenge as it kicks off today at Ellis Park Arena in the City of Johannesburg this week.","html":"NETBALL NEWS - The sun has set on final preparations by the Spar Proteas and Vitality Roses ahead of their series, The Spar Challenge as it kicks off today at Ellis Park Arena in the City of Johannesburg this week."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pictured at Johannesburg’s iconic Zoo Lake with the Spar Challenge trophy is from left South African Spar Proteas captain, KC Chawane and England’s Vitality Roses captain Fran Williams.","html":"Pictured at Johannesburg’s iconic Zoo Lake with the Spar Challenge trophy is from left South African Spar Proteas captain, KC Chawane and England’s Vitality Roses captain Fran Williams."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The three international test match series will be played on Thursday 29 January (18:00), Saturday 31 January (17:00) and Sunday 1 February (16:00)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Two hours before each of the women’s test matches the South African men will be playing against the Australian Kelpies in a friendly Pre-Match Challenge.","html":"Two hours before each of the women’s test matches the South African men will be playing against the Australian Kelpies in a friendly Pre-Match Challenge."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tickets are available on shop.netball-sa.org.za or there will be cashless ticket sales at the door.","html":"Tickets are available on shop.netball-sa.org.za or there will be cashless ticket sales at the door."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All matches will be shown live on SuperSport.","html":"All matches will be shown live on SuperSport."}]
